codeReview.summary: RE-RUN REVIEW: The prior blocking issue (regex dependency not declared) has been FIXED. The swell-orchestrator/Cargo.toml now includes 'regex.workspace = true' in both [dependencies] and [dev-dependencies] sections. cargo check, cargo test (16 tests), and cargo clippy all pass. No new blocking issues found.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The regex.workspace = true pattern is correctly used - referencing the workspace-level regex = "1" declaration. This follows the workspace dependency convention documented in AGENTS.md (don't duplicate version specs).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: swell-orchestrator/Cargo.toml has regex.workspace = true; workspace Cargo.toml has regex = "1"

summary: Re-review passed. The blocking issue from the prior review (regex dependency not declared at line 172) has been fixed. The regex crate is now properly declared via regex.workspace = true in swell-orchestrator/Cargo.toml. cargo check, cargo test (16 tests), and cargo clippy all pass. No new blocking issues were introduced.
